name: Staked avETH
redeem: savETH is the staked senior-tranche form of avETH. To exit through the protocol, holders unstake to avETH with a 1-day cooldown and no yield during cooldown, then avETH itself may need a separate redemption flow that Avant says is often completed within hours but can take up to 7 days depending on liquidity. Avant also notes large redemption waves can add delays.
notes: Not a simple idle ETH wrapper. Avant’s avETH-suite transparency page showed active deployment rather than passive custody. Asset mix snapshot dated 2026-04-01: weETH 50.60%, ETH 31.36%, WETH 18.04%. Deployment/location snapshot dated 2026-04-01: Morpho 50.68%, Aave 25.49%, Avant 12.58%, Dolomite 9.66%, Euler 1.60%, pending deployment 2.15%. This adds external protocol and strategy risk even though savETH is the senior tranche.
